To improve management of the remaining populations, this study used genomic DNA and landmark‐based geometric morphometric analyses of fish scales to evaluate whether these approaches can discriminate among phylogenetic clades, sexes and broad habitat ecotypes inhabited by extant C. lopis populations. DNA analyses of 39 specimens from eight rivers provided the first evidence of two phylogenetic clades: (i) those from Central and South Borneo and (ii) those from West Borneo, Riau, South Sumatra and Jambi. Scale morphology was characterised across eight body areas using scale dimensions (relative height and width to standard length and height‐to‐width ratio), centroid size and Procrustes shape coordinates, with repeated‐measures structure accounted for using linear mixed models and Procrustes ANOVA with a randomised residual permutation procedure (RRPP). Scale dimensions and centroid size varied significantly among body areas (all p < 0.001), with lateral and dorsal regions bearing the largest scales and the pectoral region the smallest. Clade membership had a small but significant effect on relative scale height (H/SL; β = −0.44, p = 0.024), with Clade 2 individuals consistently showing lower values than Clade 1, though scale geometry overall showed limited promise as a rapid non‐destructive stock discriminator. Both clade and sex had small but significant effects on Procrustes scale shape ( R 2 = 0.015 and 0.013, respectively; both p = 0.001), while phenotypic trajectory analysis revealed that males exhibited a significantly greater amplitude of scale shape change across body positions than females (trajectory magnitude: M = 0.289, F = 0.207; p = 0.034), despite both sexes following parallel shape trajectories along the body axis. These results provide a novel morphometric baseline for C. lopis and highlight the importance of body‐position‐specific and multivariate approaches when characterising scale morphology in endangered freshwater fishes.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用基因组DNA和基于地标点的几何形态测量学方法，评估了古代淡水鱼巨羽背鱼（Chitala lopis）的鳞片形态在系统发育支系、性别和栖息地生态型间的区分能力。DNA分析揭示了两个系统发育支系，鳞片形态在身体不同区域存在显著差异，支系和性别对鳞片形状有微小但显著的影响。研究为濒危淡水鱼的鳞片形态提供了新的形态测量基线，强调了在表征鳞片形态时需考虑身体位置特异性和多变量方法。

papers.title: Demographic analysis of the impacts of fishing pressure on the Naru eagle ray Aetobatus narutobiei in Ariake Bay, Japan
papers.authors: Wang, YanJun; Ogino, Yoshimi; Furumitsu, Keisuke; Márquez-Farías, J. Fernando; Yamaguchi, Atsuko
papers.summary_cn: 基于种群统计学方法，评估日本有明湾渔获压力对Naru eagle ray (Aetobatus narutobiei) 的影响。通过分析捕捞死亡率与种群参数，揭示该物种面临的高捕捞压力导致种群衰退风险。研究为区域渔业管理提供关键参考，强调需限制捕捞以维持种群可持续性。

papers.title: Analysis of tactile discrimination in Japanese eel (Anguilla japonica)
papers.authors: Watanabe, Shigeru
papers.summary_cn: 研究日本鳗鲡（Anguilla japonica）的触觉辨别能力，通过行为实验分析其触觉感知机制。主要发现该物种能通过触觉区分不同纹理或形状的物体，揭示了其在底栖环境中的感知适应性。

papers.title: Warming effect on tropical seagrass blue carbon: a short-term mesocosm experiment
papers.authors: Halim, Muhammad; Stankovic, Milica; Prathep, Anchana
papers.summary_cn: 通过短期中宇宙实验，探究升温对热带海草蓝碳储量的影响。研究发现温度升高显著改变了海草碳固定与分解速率，可能削弱其蓝碳功能。该结果对评估气候变化下热带海草床的碳汇潜力具有参考价值。

papers.title: Oceanographic conditions, habitat and behavioral ecology influence gray whale space use across multiple scales
papers.authors: Hildebrand, Lisa; Pirotta, Enrico; Stewart, Joshua David; New, Leslie; Bierlich, KC; Bird, Clara N; Fernandez Ajo, Alejandro; Torres, Leigh G

papers.title: Niche segregation persists over years and during the breeding and non-breeding seasons in sympatric seabirds
papers.authors: Jacoby, Júlia; Lanco, Sophie; Barbraud, Christophe; Delord, Karine; Bugoni, Leandro; Nunes, Guilherme Tavares

papers.title: Seaweed form as a carbon capture proxy: surface area-to-volume ratio as a general predictor of marine macroalgae productivity
papers.authors: Machado, João P. G.; de Oliveira, Vinícius P.
papers.abstract: Abstract Seaweeds are major contributors to coastal primary production and are increasingly targeted for aquaculture and blue carbon strategies. However, general and low-cost models to estimate their productivity and carbon capture remain lacking. We tested whether the surface area to volume ratio (AV) predicts primary productivity across 11 tropical macroalgal species from the Brazilian coast, using ex situ light–dark bottle oxygen incubations. Net primary productivity (NPP), gross primary productivity (GPP), and respiration (R) were quantified and related to species-specific AV values obtained from morphometric analysis. AV was strongly correlated with NPP (r = 0.72) and GPP (r = 0.68), but weakly and negatively with R (r = –0.22). Regression models with AV as the predictor explained 57–65% of the variance in NPP and GPP, enabling derivation of predictive equations for primary productivity and carbon capture. Based on these relationships, we developed C eaweed , a trait-based framework that scales from species to communities by combining AV distributions with species frequencies. This model provides a reproducible and low-cost tool for estimating seaweed carbon capture and supports applications in aquaculture, ecosystem monitoring, and blue carbon accounting. C eaweed represents the first cross-taxa quantitative model linking algal morphology to carbon capture and establishes AV as a predictive functional trait for macroalgal productivity.
papers.summary_cn: 通过测量11种巴西热带大型海藻的比表面积（AV），发现AV与净初级生产力（NPP）和总初级生产力（GPP）显著正相关（r=0.72, 0.68），可解释57-65%的生产力变异。基于此建立了C_eaweed模型，通过AV分布与物种频率结合实现从个体到群落的碳汇估算，为水产养殖、蓝碳核算提供了低成本工具。该模型首次跨类群定量建立了藻类形态与碳捕获的预测关系。

papers.title: K-Means Analysis of West Java Coastal Capture Fish Production to Increase Fisheries Productivity
papers.authors: Azzahra, Siti Salwa; Maresti, Fatia Amalia; Mustaqim, Kiki
papers.abstract: Marine capture fisheries in West Java play a vital role in regional economic development, yet disparities in productivity among coastal areas remain unresolved. This study aims to classify coastal districts and cities in West Java based on key production indicators: fish catch volume, number of vessels, number of marine fishers, average weighted price per kilogram, and the number of fishing households. A K-Means Clustering approach was applied to group these regions into homogeneous clusters, enabling more targeted policy development. The analysis identified three distinct clusters: moderately productive areas with low efficiency, economically efficient areas with high-value catch but limited volume, and a dominant production zone with significantly higher outputs than others. These findings provide a clearer understanding of regional fishery dynamics and offer recommendations for each cluster. Proposed strategies include expanding infrastructure and training for low-performing regions, and focusing on product diversification, post-harvest processing, and sustainable management in high-performing areas. This study demonstrates the usefulness of data-driven methods to support marine fishery development and regional planning.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究采用K-Means聚类方法，基于渔获量、渔船数、渔民数、加权平均价格及渔户数等指标，对西爪哇沿海县市进行渔业生产力分类。分析识别出三类区域：中等生产力低效区、高价值渔获但产量有限的经济高效区，以及主导高产区。针对不同集群提出差异化策略，包括低效区加强基础设施与培训，高产区推动产品多样化、产后加工与可持续管理。研究展示了数据驱动方法在渔业区域规划中的应用价值。

papers.title: The jaws in the jaws: Morphofunctional analysis of the pharyngeal plates of Labrus viridis Linnaeus, 1758 (Teleostei, Labridae)
papers.authors: Di Camillo, Cristina Gioia; Zichittella, Gaspare; Tiralongo, Francesco
papers.abstract: Abstract Functional morphology highlights the adaptive flexibility of fish feeding strategies across environmental gradients and seasonal variations, providing key insights for the management and conservation of ichthyofaunal communities and their habitats. Labridae fishes possess a specialized pharyngeal jaw apparatus (PJA) that enables them to crush and consume prey with heavily calcified or chitinized shells. This functional adaptation has expanded their dietary flexibility, promoted trophic specialization and enhanced the ecological diversity of wrasses. Here, we present the first comprehensive morphological analysis of the pharyngeal jaws of Labrus viridis Linnaeus, 1758, a labrid fish widely distributed in shallow coastal habitats of the Mediterranean Sea. The PJA was examined using micro‐computed tomography (micro‐CT), scanning electron microscopy and energy‐dispersive X‐ray spectroscopy. Stomach contents from eight specimens were also analysed to infer prey composition and feeding strategy. The pharyngeal jaws of L. viridis are characterized by unicuspid molariform and caniniform teeth, showing intraosseous tooth development, weakly developed plicidentine and a one‐to‐one tooth replacement. This heterodont dentition, together with the predominance of caniniform over molariform teeth and the diverse prey items identified in gut contents, indicates an opportunistic feeding strategy and a diet distinct from that of the congeneric Labrus bergylta . This work suggests the existence of ecological divergence among congeneric species. Moreover, our results provide a reference point for linking the morphofunctional traits to the dietary role of L. viridis , encouraging new investigations into the morphology of the PJA and trophic dynamics of other Mediterranean wrasses.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究首次对地中海褐菖鲉（Labrus viridis）的咽颌装置（PJA）进行综合形态功能分析，利用micro-CT、扫描电镜和能谱分析揭示其单尖臼齿与犬齿并存的异齿结构、骨内齿发育及一对一替换模式。胃含物分析显示其机会主义摄食策略，与同属物种Labrus bergylta存在食性分化，表明同属鱼类存在生态位分化。该结果为理解咽颌形态与营养生态的关联提供了参考，为地中海隆头鱼类的摄食动力学研究奠定基础。

papers.title: Tooth morphology of deep‐water catsharks of the genus Apristurus (Chondrichthyes: Pentanchidae) in the North Atlantic Ocean
papers.authors: Seifert, Jesco; Moore, Daniel M.
papers.abstract: Abstract The deep‐water catshark family (Pentanchidae) is the most species‐rich family among extant shark lineages. Within this family, the genus Apristurus is the largest, comprising small, deep‐sea species characterised by elongated bodies and dorso‐ventrally compressed snouts. Five Apristurus species are currently recognised from the North Atlantic, including waters surrounding Ireland and the United Kingdom ( A. aphyodes , A. laurussonii , A. manis , A. melanoasper and A. microps ). However, their biology remains poorly understood owing to their occurrence at considerable depths and their close morphological similarity. This study presents the first comprehensive comparative analysis of tooth morphology for Apristurus species recorded in the region. The results reveal pronounced sexual dimorphism in A. aphyodes and provide evidence supporting ontogenetic changes in tooth morphology in A. melanoasper and A. microps . Furthermore, distinctive morphological characteristics are identified and described for each species using scanning electron microscopy of the dentition. These findings establish novel diagnostic criteria that enhance the reliability of species identification and provide a robust framework for future taxonomic and ecological research.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究首次对北大西洋深水猫鲨属（Apristurus）5种鲨鱼的牙齿形态进行系统比较分析。通过扫描电镜观察齿列，发现A. aphyodes存在显著性别二态性，A. melanoasper和A. microps具有个体发育性牙齿形态变化。研究确立了各物种的鉴别性形态特征，为提升物种鉴定准确性及后续分类学、生态学研究提供了可靠依据。

papers.title: Substrate limitation and environmental heterogeneity shape kelp habitat distribution in a complex coastal landscape
papers.authors: Barbosa, Romina Vanessa; Schuster, Jasmin; Godwin, Sean; Man, Lauren; Dedeluk, Nicola; Bianucci, Laura; Neufeld, Christopher J; Costa, Maycira
papers.summary_cn: 底质限制与环境异质性共同塑造了复杂海岸景观中海带栖息地的分布格局。研究通过空间分析揭示了底质类型、水深及水动力条件对海带生境的关键调控作用。

papers.title: Interannual and seasonal variations of ichthyoplankton assemblages in the South-Central Tyrrhenian Sea
papers.authors: Liguori, Gianluca; Carotenuto, Ylenia; Dall'Olmo, Giorgio; Ambrosio, Maria Assunta; Buondonno, Angela; Chiarore, Antonia; Mirasole, Alice; Cianelli, Daniela; Ciannelli, Lorenzo
papers.summary_cn: 基于南第勒尼安海中部浮游鱼类的年度和季节采样数据，分析了其群落的年际与季节变化规律。研究发现，不同季节间物种组成和丰度存在显著差异，且年际变化主要受环境因子（如海流、温度）驱动。该研究为理解该海域鱼类早期资源动态提供了基础数据。

papers.title: Gene cloning, characterization and expression analysis of MAVS in Chinese black sleeper ( Bostrychus sinensis )
papers.authors: Zhou, Zhenzhen; Zhang, Jianshe
papers.abstract: Abstract Mitochondrial antiviral signalling protein (MAVS) is a critical adaptor in RIG‐I‐like receptor‐mediated antiviral innate immunity; however, its molecular characteristics and expression profiles in Chinese black sleeper ( Bostrychus sinensis ) remain poorly understood. In this study, the full‐length coding sequence of MAVS from B. sinensis ( BsMAVS ) was cloned and characterized. BsMAVS encodes 827 amino acid residues and contains a conserved caspase activation and recruitment domain (CARD). Multiple sequence alignment and phylogenetic analyses demonstrated that BsMAVS, particularly its CARD domain, is highly conserved among teleost species. Furthermore, qPCR analysis indicated that BsMAVS is constitutively expressed in various tissues of healthy B. sinensis , with relatively higher expression levels in immune‐related tissues, including the spleen and head kidney. BsMAVS expression was dynamically regulated in the spleen, peripheral blood, liver and head kidney following polyinosinic‐polycytidylic acid (poly[I:C]) stimulation. These results provide baseline molecular and expression information for MAVS in B. sinensis , contributing to a better understanding of antiviral‐related genes in teleost fishes.
papers.summary_cn: 克隆并鉴定了中华乌塘鳢（Bostrychus sinensis）线粒体抗病毒信号蛋白（MAVS）基因的全长编码序列，该基因编码827个氨基酸，含有保守的CARD结构域。系统发育分析显示BsMAVS在硬骨鱼类中高度保守，且在脾脏和头肾等免疫组织中组成型高表达。poly(I:C)刺激后，BsMAVS在脾脏、外周血、肝脏和头肾中的表达呈动态变化。研究为硬骨鱼类抗病毒基因功能解析提供了基础分子信息。

papers.title:
Unveiling the whale shark diet: Insights from stomach content
                    <scp>DNA</scp>
                    metabarcoding
papers.authors: García‐Baciero, Alberto; Loughlin, Camila Mac; Ramírez‐Macías, Dení; Munguia‐Vega, Adrian
papers.abstract: Abstract This study presents the first direct dietary assessment of a juvenile whale shark ( Rhincodon typus ) using DNA recovered from its stomach content. A DNA metabarcoding library for the 18S gene showed the most abundant prey were cnidarians (Class Anthozoa, 43.4%, including soft corals and sea pens) and crustaceans (Class Hexanauplia, 40.2%, represented by four orders of copepods). These results expand the breadth of items present in the diet of whale sharks and underscore gaps in understanding the trophic ecology and habitat use of elusive and threatened marine megafauna.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究首次利用胃内容物DNA宏条形码技术，对幼年鲸鲨（Rhincodon typus）的食性进行直接评估。18S基因文库显示，其主要猎物为刺胞动物（珊瑚虫纲，43.4%，包括软珊瑚和海鳃）和甲壳动物（六鳃纲，40.2%，以四个目桡足类为代表）。该结果拓展了鲸鲨食性组成认知，揭示了这一濒危大型海洋生物在营养生态与栖息地利用研究中的空白。

papers.title: Feeding habits of the cutlassfish Trichiurus japonicus in Osaka Bay, Japan
papers.authors: Kimura, Yuki
papers.summary_cn: 研究日本大阪湾日本带鱼（Trichiurus japonicus）的摄食习性。通过胃含物分析，鉴定其食物组成与季节变化。主要发现该鱼种以鱼类和甲壳类为主食，摄食强度随个体大小和环境因素变化。

papers.title: Assessment of socio-economic impacts of fisheries development programs on the livelihood of fish farmers in Jharkhand
papers.authors: Kachhap, Swati; Umamaheswari, T.; Rajakumar, M.; Athithan, S.; Singh, A. K.; P., Aboobacker Siddique; Seenivasan, P.
papers.summary_cn: 评估印度贾坎德邦渔业发展项目对养殖户生计的社会经济影响，旨在分析项目在收入、就业和家庭福利方面的成效。通过调查数据与对比分析，发现项目显著提升了养殖户的经济状况，但存在区域间受益不均问题。研究为优化渔业扶贫政策提供了实证依据。

papers.title: North Korea’s fisheries law and cross-border fisheries governance: a doctrinal assessment of domestic control and regional transparency
papers.authors: Hong, Dae Un
papers.abstract: Large-scale illegal, unreported, and unregulated (IUU) fishing in waters claimed by the Democratic People’s Republic of Korea (DPRK) has been documented mainly through satellite analysis and sanctions-enforcement studies. However, these approaches reveal little about how the DPRK’s own law structures authority, access, inspection, and legal responsibility. This article uses doctrinal legal analysis to examine the DPRK Fisheries Law using the accessible 2015 and 2022 consolidated texts, the 20 May 2025 amendment—used as a confirmatory and contextual extension—and the broader amendment history reflected in earlier legal materials. The statute is assessed across four governance pillars—conservation and sustainable use; monitoring, control, and surveillance; access authorization and foreign-vessel control; and sanctions and deterrence—against differentiated benchmarks drawn from the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea, the Port State Measures Agreement, the FAO Code of Conduct for Responsible Fisheries, and fisheries-related UN sanctions. The 2015 and 2022 texts show partial alignment in conservation planning, protected-resource management, and formal authorization, but persistent gaps remain in monitoring infrastructure, inspection traceability, foreign-access transparency, and cooperative information sharing. While the 2025 amendment confirms a further move toward denser domestic legal responsibility, including direct stoppage measures, steeper fines, and a more differentiated sanction ladder, it lacks a parallel advance in monitoring or transparency. The DPRK framework therefore operates more as an instrument of domestic administrative control than as an integrated component of regional fisheries governance. By grounding this conclusion in the statute’s own internal evolution rather than in vessel-behavior evidence alone, the article provides a more comprehensive legal baseline for future research on fisheries governance in sanctioned, low-transparency settings.
papers.summary_cn: 本研究采用教义法学分析方法，以朝鲜2015年、2022年渔业法文本及2025年修正案为基础，评估其在养护与可持续利用、监测监控、准入授权及制裁威慑四大治理支柱上的表现。对照《联合国海洋法公约》等国际基准，发现朝鲜法律在保护规划与资源管理上部分达标，但在监测基础设施、检查可追溯性、外国准入透明度及信息共享方面存在持续缺陷。2025年修正案强化了国内法律责任，但未同步提升监测或透明度，表明该法律体系更偏向国内行政控制工具，而非区域渔业治理的整合组成部分。

papers.title: Availability of dark daytime refuge may limit mysid abundance in the Laurentian Great Lakes
papers.authors: Nasworthy, Kayden; Watkins, James M; Evans, Thomas M.; Blair, Hannah B.; Lawhun, Sarah D; Sethi, Suresh A.; OBrien, Timothy; Warner, David M.; Pothoven, Steven A; Scofield, Anne E
papers.abstract: The zooplankton Mysis diluviana is a major component of the Laurentian Great Lakes food web and has recently declined in abundance in both lakes Michigan and Huron. The drivers of these declines are not well understood. Here, we explore the hypothesis that recent increases in water clarity have contributed to the decline of M. diluviana (mysids) by limiting the availability of daytime dark refuge from visual predators. Using Secchi depth data from 1996-2021, we estimate that dark refuge has decreased substantially in lakes Michigan and Huron where mysids have declined, but dark refuge has remained more stable in Ontario and Superior where mysid populations did not decline. Results from a 2021 uncrewed surface vessel hydroacoustic survey and lake-wide net-based sampling in lakes Michigan and Huron revealed significantly more mysids in areas with dark refuge, such as Lake Michigan's northern basin. Conversely, Lake Huron contains sparse dark refuge consistent with low mysid densities in that lake. Higher water clarity leading to increased predation may be a primary driver of mysid declines in the Great Lakes.
papers.summary_cn: 研究通过分析1996-2021年Secchi深度数据，探讨了水体透明度增加导致白天暗色庇护所减少，进而限制Mysis diluviana（糠虾）丰度假说。在密歇根湖和休伦湖，暗色庇护所显著减少且糠虾种群下降，而安大略湖和苏必利尔湖庇护所较稳定且种群未衰退。2021年无人船水声调查和网采数据证实，密歇根湖北部等有暗色庇护所区域糠虾密度显著更高，而休伦湖因庇护所稀少导致糠虾密度低。研究表明，水体透明度升高引发的捕食压力增加可能是五大湖糠虾衰退的主要驱动因素。

papers.title: Temperature, but not acidification, influences the growth and lipid profile of juvenile sand whiting, Sillago ciliata (Cuvier 1829)
papers.authors: Shalders, Tanika C.; Tan, Melissa; Hall, Karina C.; Coleman, Melinda A.; Kelaher, Brendan; Champion, Curtis; Benkendorff, Kirsten
papers.abstract: Abstract Seafood provides an essential source of macro‐ and micronutrients for coastal communities worldwide. Climate change is a key threat to seafood security, altering the sizes, abundances, distributions, physiology and ecological interactions of fisheries species, and increasingly, there is evidence of impacts to seafood nutritional quality. In a 12‐week mesocosm experiment, we tested the influence of projected ocean warming and acidification scenarios on the growth and lipid quality of juvenile sand whiting ( Sillago ciliata ), a popular fisheries species in eastern Australia. The growth of S. ciliata significantly increased (by 61% body weight) under elevated temperature (+3°C) but was not affected by acidification treatment levels. Lipidomic analysis revealed no influence of temperature or acidification on total lipid content or the composition and total proportions of lipid classes and subclasses. However, elevated temperatures significantly impacted the overall composition of fatty acids, including a shift toward higher saturation and a decline in important omega‐3 fatty acids. Fish exposed to elevated temperature treatments had more saturated fatty acids than those at control temperatures, along with reduced levels of the valuable omega‐3 eicosapentaenoic (C20:5) and docosahexaenoic (C22:6) fatty acids. Despite impacting fatty acid composition in S. ciliata, the increased growth of the juvenile whiting, if sustained into adulthood, under elevated temperatures, may help compensate for the overall availability of essential polyunsaturated fatty acids to support consumer nutritional requirements. These findings contribute to the growing body of evidence on variable climate resilience in nearshore species to future environmental conditions and the implications for the trophic transfer of nutrients in estuarine ecosystems.
papers.summary_cn: 通过12周中宇宙实验，探究了升温（+3°C）和酸化对澳洲东部重要渔业物种沙鲻（Sillago ciliata）幼鱼生长及脂质品质的影响。升温使幼鱼体重显著增加61%，但酸化无显著影响；脂质组学分析显示总脂含量和脂类组成未受环境因子影响，但升温导致脂肪酸组成向高饱和方向转变，关键omega-3脂肪酸（EPA和DHA）含量下降。若幼鱼期加速生长可持续至成体，可能部分补偿必需多不饱和脂肪酸的总供应量，以维持消费者营养需求。研究为近岸物种对气候变化的差异化适应及河口生态系统营养传递提供了新证据。

papers.title: Dietary sodium propionate enhances growth performance, digestive enzymes, haematology and immunity in Wallago attu
papers.authors: Tanveer, Ayesha; Khan, Noor; Fatima, Mahroze; Shakir, Hafiz Abdullah; Khizar, Ayesha; Shah, Syed Zakir Hussain; Kareem, Laiba; Aftab, Saba; Ramzan, Malik Muhammad; Mustafa, Ahmed
papers.abstract: Abstract Sodium propionate (SP), a short‐chain fatty acid, has been widely used as a feed additive to improve fish growth and health status. The current experiment was designed to investigate the effects of dietary SP on growth, enzymatic activities, haematology and immune status of Wallago attu . Fingerlings (initial weight = 8.80 ± 0.58 g) were fed with graded levels of SP comprising 0.0, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 4.0 and 8.0 g/kg levels for 60 days in triplicate glass aquaria (89 × 58 × 61 cm [length × width × depth]). The results showed significant ( p < 0.05) improvement in growth parameters such as weight gain (%), specific growth rate and feed conversion ratio up to 4 g/kg SP. Moreover, the whole‐body proximate composition (crude protein and lipid content) and antioxidant enzymes (superoxide dismutase, catalase, glutathione peroxidase) showed significant improvements up to 4 g/kg. However, the digestive enzyme activities (amylase, protease, lipase) increased significantly at 2 g/kg, while decreased malondialdehyde content was observed at 2–4 g/kg. Furthermore, the haematological (haemoglobin, haematocrit, red blood cells and white blood cells counts) and nonspecific immune parameters (serum total protein, lysozyme and IgM) improved significantly up to 4 g/kg and decreased thereafter. Moreover, Polynomial regression analysis showed that 5.88 g/kg SP is the optimum requirement for the growth of W. attu fingerlings when fed with graded levels of SP. In conclusion, the SP supplementation in W. attu showed best results ranged between 2 and 4 g/kg level by improving fish health and growth performance.
papers.summary_cn: 研究丙酸钠（SP）作为饲料添加剂对叉尾鲶（Wallago attu）幼鱼生长性能、消化酶活性、血液学及免疫指标的影响。在为期60天的饲养实验中，添加2–4 g/kg SP可显著提升增重率、特定生长率和饲料转化率，并改善体成分粗蛋白和粗脂肪含量、抗氧化酶活性及非特异性免疫参数。多项式回归分析表明，SP最适添加量为5.88 g/kg。结论：2–4 g/kg SP可有效促进叉尾鲶生长与健康。

papers.authors: James, Huw W.; Stephenson, Fabrice; Collins, Martin A.; Hill, Simeon L.; Reid, William D. K.
papers.abstract: Abstract Monitoring reproductive traits in Southern Ocean species is challenging. Males in some channichthyids thicken the epithelium along their anal fins to aid nest construction. This study presents initial evidence that the only commercially harvested channichthyid, mackerel icefish ( Champsocephalus gunnari ), exhibits modifications to their anal fins, and that these features are ephemeral and possibly sexually dimorphic. The evidence presented may indicate nesting behaviour, although further work is necessary to validate this hypothesis. Confirming icefish nesting sites in the Scotia Sea could provide further support for the continued prohibition of bottom trawling.
papers.summary_cn: 研究旨在验证商业捕捞的南极鱼种——麦氏冰鱼（Champsocephalus gunnari）是否具有巢穴行为。通过观察其臀鳍形态变化，发现该鱼种存在短暂且可能具性别二态性的臀鳍上皮增厚特征，与已知的巢穴构建行为相符。这一发现为确认斯科舍海冰鱼产卵场提供了初步证据，可进一步支持禁止底拖网捕捞的现行管理措施。

papers.title: Drivers of cannibalism in early juvenile Japanese mitten crabs Eriocheir japonica under laboratory conditions
papers.authors: Yamamoto, Takeo; Sadose, Goku; Ohira, Tsuyoshi
papers.summary_cn: 实验室条件下，研究日本绒螯蟹早期幼蟹同类相食的驱动因素。通过控制实验，分析密度、饥饿程度和个体大小差异对同类相食率的影响。发现高密度和饥饿显著增加相食行为，个体大小差异是主要诱因。

papers.title: Linking environmental variability to seasonal individual occurrence of male sperm whales Physeter macrocephalus in the North-East Atlantic
papers.authors: Morange, Zoë Luccia; Blanchet, Marie-Anne; Similä, Tiu; Naciri, Marwan; Rikardsen, Audun H; Cubaynes, Sarah
papers.summary_cn: 通过分析环境变量与雄性抹香鲸（Physeter macrocephalus）在东北大西洋的季节性个体出现模式，揭示海洋环境波动对其分布的影响。研究结合长期观测数据与环境因子（如海表温度、叶绿素浓度），发现个体出现频率与特定环境条件显著相关。该结果有助于理解抹香鲸栖息地利用动态，为海洋保护区（MPA）规划提供参考。

papers.title: Release and bioavailability of dissolved organic carbon derived from Fucus serratus and Zostera marina
papers.authors: Brinch-Iversen, Leah; Glud, Ronnie N; Middelboe, Mathias; Attard, Karl
papers.summary_cn: 研究海藻Fucus serratus与海草Zostera marina释放的溶解有机碳（DOC）的释放过程及其生物可利用性。通过实验分析两种大型水生植物DOC的释放速率与微生物降解特性，揭示其对近海碳循环的潜在贡献。

papers.title: Characterization of the vertical distribution of plankton and the formation of thin layers off the Mississippi river plume using digital holography
papers.authors: Moreno, Gelaysi; Kerkar, Anvita U.; Nayak, Aditya R.; McFarland, Malcolm; Lopes, Rubens M.
papers.summary_cn: 利用数字全息技术研究密西西比河羽流区浮游生物垂直分布特征及薄层形成机制。通过高分辨率原位观测，揭示了浮游生物在羽流锋面区域的层化聚集现象。该研究为理解河口富营养化水域的浮游生态动力学提供了新方法。

papers.title: Protecting fishes in agricultural drains: evaluating Canadian policy using environmental DNA
papers.authors: Morphet, Markelle E.; Van Nynatten, Alexander; Yates, Matthew C.; Mandrak, Nicholas E.
papers.abstract: Diverse aquatic communities inhabit agricultural drains, but maintenance of these drains can harm fishes and their habitats. In Canada, drains are classified based on their fish assemblages to protect sensitive species by managing drain-maintenance activities. Current Fisheries and Oceans Canada (DFO) fish sampling is challenged by environmental constraints and limited resources. To evaluate the effectiveness of current DFO methods to classify drains, we compared species detected by DFO methods (dip nets, electrofishing, seines) and by environmental DNA (eDNA) metabarcoding with two primers. Environmental DNA detected more species (n=28) than the DFO methods (n=18) at 59% of drain segments, resulting in changes to 10 of 29 drain classifications. These results suggest that current DFO methods are insufficient to classify drains and, hence, adequately protect sensitive fishes and fish habitat within them. While we show the potential of eDNA to detect fish species in drains, both methods may be susceptible to imperfect detection resulting in incorrect drain classification. Therefore, studies should conduct occupancy modelling and cost analyses for both methods to determine the optimal sampling strategy for drain classification.
papers.summary_cn: 利用环境DNA（eDNA）评估加拿大农业排水渠鱼类保护政策效果。研究发现，eDNA方法检测到28种鱼类，高于加拿大渔业与海洋部（DFO）传统方法（18种），导致29段排水渠中10段分类结果改变。表明现行DFO方法难以充分保护敏感鱼类及其栖息地，建议结合占用模型与成本分析优化采样策略。

papers.title: Integrating habitat connectivity and fishing pressure to promote migratory marine species conservation
papers.authors: Li, Guodong; Feng, Cuicui; Han, Haibin; Ge, Xinyun; Zhang, Rongliang; Cheng, Fangping; Fang, Xin; Dong, Han; Liu, Chang; Huang, Wei
papers.journal: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries
papers.summary_cn: 通过整合栖息地连通性与捕捞压力，旨在促进洄游海洋物种保护。研究构建了空间分析框架，量化关键洄游通道与捕捞热点重叠区域。结果为MPA网络设计和渔业管理提供科学依据，以平衡生态保护与资源利用。
papers.keywords_matched: Reviews in Fish Biology and Fisheries

papers.title: Climate‐driven shifts in early life history via shortened marine residence in amphidromous ayu Plecoglossus altivelis
papers.authors: Nagayama, Shigeya; Fujii, Ryouji; Harada, Morihiro; Ohara, Kenichi
papers.abstract: Abstract Climate warming is altering thermal regimes across freshwater and marine ecosystems, with important consequences for fish life‐history schedules, particularly during early life stages that span connected habitats. We characterized long‐term variation in multiple early life‐history traits and examined how thermal factors relate to shifts in the early life‐history schedule of amphidromous ayu Plecoglossus altivelis . Individuals initiating spring upstream migration earlier were hatched earlier and were larger in body size across brood years, consistent with established patterns. In contrast, age at migration showed no consistent relationship with migration timing, indicating that variation in marine residence duration is not solely determined by migration phenology but is influenced by conditions experienced during the marine phase. Over the past three decades, age at spring migration declined significantly, indicating progressive shortening of the marine residence period. This decline was closely associated with elevated winter seawater temperature, whereas riverine thermal indicators representing the onset and termination of marine residence showed no comparable relationship. Although delayed autumn reproduction has been reported under warming river conditions, enhanced winter growth in the marine environment may offset these effects, resulting in little long‐term change in migration timing. Overall, this study provides evidence that climate‐driven changes in coastal marine thermal conditions are associated with shifts in marine residence duration and early life‐history schedules in amphidromous fishes, highlighting the importance of integrated freshwater–marine thermal regimes under ongoing climate warming.
papers.summary_cn: 气候变暖正在改变两栖洄游鱼类香鱼（Plecoglossus altivelis）的早期生活史进程。基于长期数据，研究发现过去三十年间春季洄游年龄显著下降，表明海洋栖息时间持续缩短。这种缩短与冬季海水温度升高密切相关，而河流温度指标则无显著影响。研究揭示了沿海海洋热条件变化对两栖鱼类早期生活史策略的驱动作用，强调了淡水-海洋热环境整合分析的重要性。

papers.title: Variability in a pulsed resource influences marine trophic dynamics in coastal Newfoundland, Canada: Insights from stable isotopes
papers.authors: Gulka, Julia; Jenkins, Edward; Johnson, Kelsey F; Carvalho, Paloma; Maynard, Laurie D; Lescure, Lauren Marie-Therese; Berard, Marissa; Davoren, Gail
papers.summary_cn: 本研究利用稳定同位素技术，探讨加拿大纽芬兰沿海脉冲式资源（如季节性饵料）的变异性对海洋营养动态的影响。通过分析不同时间尺度下的同位素数据，揭示了资源波动如何改变食物网结构及物种间营养关系。结果表明，脉冲资源的时空变化是驱动该区域海洋生态系统营养动态的关键因素。

papers.title: Competition mechanisms of the common soft coral Clavularia koellikeri for benthic space domination
papers.authors: Grillo, Ana C.; Longo, Guilherme O.; Hoey, Andrew S.; Hoogenboom, Mia O.
papers.summary_cn: 研究目的为探究常见软珊瑚Clavularia koellikeri在底栖空间竞争中占据主导地位的机制。通过观察其竞争行为与生态策略，发现该物种可能通过化学防御或物理覆盖等方式抑制其他底栖生物生长。该研究为理解珊瑚礁生态系统中的种间竞争与空间分配提供了关键证据。

papers.title: From processes to traits: a mechanistic framework for understanding ecosystem roles of cryptobenthic reef fishes
papers.authors: Pombo-Ayora, Lucía; Coker, Darren J.; Berumen, Michael L.
papers.summary_cn: 提出一个机制框架，将隐栖礁鱼类的生态过程（如摄食、繁殖）与其功能性状（如体型、行为）联系起来，以理解它们在珊瑚礁生态系统中的角色。该框架旨在揭示这些小型鱼类在营养循环、栖息地改造等关键过程中的贡献，弥补传统研究对其生态作用的低估。

papers.title: Diel and seasonal ichthyofauna variability reveal limitations of daytime-only sampling in a warm-temperate South African estuary
papers.authors: Bornman, Eugin; Adams, Janine Barbara; Strydom, Nadine Amelia
papers.summary_cn: 研究通过昼夜和季节采样，揭示了南非暖温带河口鱼类群落的显著时间变化。结果表明，仅白天采样会低估夜行性物种和部分洄游鱼类的丰度，导致对群落结构的片面认知。该发现强调了在河口鱼类监测中纳入昼夜采样方案的必要性，以提升stock assessment和生态评估的准确性。
